cardTitle: AI and Algorithms Qualification Toolkit (AI AQT)
description1: Questionnaire 1 provides a well-founded assessment whether a data-driven application qualifies as an AI system under the
description1_1: by answering a maximum of three questions.
description2: By answering three additional questions, it also allows for identification of solely automated decision-making (sADM), following from
description3: Through four additional questions, the questionnaire also determines whether an algorithm qualifies as a high-impact algorithm, according to the
description5: Questionnaire 2 determines the risk category of an AI system within 5-30 questions.
description6: These dynamic questionnaires are developed for public sector organizations but can also be valuable for other sectors.

disclaimer: Note: Always verify the outcomes of this tool using legal expertise, the legal text and additional relevant sources. This tool contains interpretations of complex legal definitions, as understood by Stichting Algorithm Audit. The interpretation of these definitions has not yet crystallized and many more years, additional guidance and various court cases will be needed before there is a shared universal interpretation. In addition, nuance is sometimes lost when translating legal definitions into understandable language. No rights can be derived from the outcomes of this tool.
